creator: tomaz.borstnar@over.net
text:
At 06:40 29.12.00, David W. Chapman Jr. wrote:
>Isn't the proper way to export your database and re import it as changed may
>have been made to the structure, probably not in this small version change,
>but I think its generally good practice.

This practice is fine, but port should STOP and NOTIFY the user about the 
fact that datadir is already present and give instructions what to do next. 
Destroying the datadir is the worst that could happen! It should have an 
option to continue anyway, but this must be user setting.

Tomaz
